g.title: permission.usr_grp_map:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: permission.usr_grp_map:grp->permission.grp_tree:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (grp) REFERENCES permission.grp_tree(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
